responses: Hello! Welcome to Moda Clothing 😊

patterns: What is the cloth made of?
responses: Our products are made from high-quality materials like cotton, polyester, and blends 🧵
Each product description includes fabric details 👍
We offer sizes from S to XXL 📏. Check our size chart for exact measurements.
You can find the size guide on each product page 👍
We provide slim fit, regular fit, and oversized styles 👕
Check product descriptions to see fit type 👍
Prices are listed on each product page 💰
We offer affordable fashion with great quality 👍

patterns: Do you accept cash on delivery?
responses: We accept Cash on Delivery and online payments 💳
You can choose your payment method at checkout 👍
Yes! We offer exchanges for size issues within a few days 🔄

Yes! We regularly have discounts and seasonal offers 🎉
